plan_title: Gantt Critical/High Tasks Due Soon Emailer
plan_description: Reads a Google Sheets Gantt tab, finds Critical/High priority tasks whose due date is in the next 3 days (inclusive of today), and emails an HTML summary table to the user.

data: - Use Google Sheets spreadsheet_id '1RHLbBXzrKv24gNgp7a4Lr7RlMIrP9fjacfGWjhPAbOE' as the source spreadsheet.
- Read task rows from the sheet tab named 'Gantt'.
- Read a wide range that covers all relevant columns (use range 'Gantt!A:Z').
- Treat the first row of the 'Gantt' tab as the header row and use header names to locate columns.
- Use the column whose header is exactly 'Tasks' as the task name field.
- Use the column whose header is exactly 'Due Date' as the finish/due date field.
- Use the column whose header is exactly 'Priority' as the priority field.
- Use the column whose header is exactly 'Status' as the status field.
actions: - Parse each non-header row into a task object using the header row as field names.
- For each task, interpret the 'Due Date' value as a date.
- Filter tasks to only those where 'Priority' is exactly 'Critical' OR exactly 'High'.
- Filter tasks to only those where 'Due Date' is between today and today + 3 days, inclusive.
- Sort the matching tasks by 'Due Date' ascending (earliest first).
- If there is at least 1 matching task, generate an HTML email body that contains a nice summary table.
- If there are 0 matching tasks, generate an HTML email body that clearly states there are no 'Critical' or 'High' priority tasks due in the next 3 days (inclusive of today).
output: - When there are matching tasks, produce a nice HTML summary table embedded in the email body (html_body).
- The HTML table must include exactly these columns in this order: Task name, Finish date, Priority, Status.
- Map output columns to sheet headers as follows: Task name ← 'Tasks'; Finish date ← 'Due Date'; Priority ← 'Priority'; Status ← 'Status'.
- The email subject must clearly indicate it is a due-soon summary for Critical/High tasks (for example: 'Gantt: Critical/High tasks due in next 3 days').
- When there are no matching tasks, produce a short HTML email body (html_body) stating 'No Critical/High tasks due in the next 3 days'.
delivery: - Send the email via Gmail to the user at meiribarak@gmail.com.
- Do not CC or BCC anyone.
processing_steps: - Read the 'Gantt!A:Z' values from Google Sheets.
- Map the header row to column indexes for: Tasks, Due Date, Priority, Status.
- Convert each row into a structured task record.
- Compute the date window: today through today + 3 days (inclusive).
- Render the HTML email content (table or no-matches message).

resolved_user_inputs.value: Due Date between today and today+3 days (inclusive)
Task name, Finish date, Priority, Status
use header names from first row
